Age Suitability & Rating

Echo is designed to be a safe, positive, and mindful space for users of all ages. Because of this, it is rated as suitable for ages 4 and up (4+).

  • No Social Networking or unsolicited contact.
  • No violent, mature, or inappropriate content.
  • No advertisements or data tracking.
